text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, crap! How'd this happen?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I had my eyes glued on Air Shakur the entire race,
even though I came here to cheer on Doto!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Me too... Man, this is so not fair!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The way she ran, it was like you couldn't help but
look at her! She was just so much larger than life.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Good. That's what I wanna hear.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(They're so damn noisy, but all the better that
they are.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I've got my eye on an even bigger race than this.
I wanna kick up a racket so loud, even people
who don't care about racing get swallowed up in
the frenzy.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Next stop, the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Time to bring the storm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoooamigosh! Just look at Shakur, standing in
the rain, racewear plastered against her wet skin!
Her face dark and brooding! Her brain plotting!
What beauty! WHAT GRACE!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...She's so cool, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well yeah, that's obvi—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gwack?! Doto?! U-um, what did you just say?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I've ever seen Shakur look that
happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, she's so cool... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! The bond between roommates! It's too
much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...H-huh? Digital? Wh-where'd she go? She just
disappeared!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is not uncommon to lose oneself before a
superior work of art.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In fact, her disappearing upon my arrival is but
one of the many natural laws of this world!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-oh, so that's what happened!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But this is not a time for celebration, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An unwanted intruder has infiltrated our stage. I
would not fault her if she were only seeking to
seize the leading role, but no—she plans to
destroy our production entirely.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must make it crystal clear who the lead and
her ever worthy rival truly are at the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I must witness this myself at the very front of the
Arima Kinen! My reputation as an Uma simp
depends on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur laughs alone as she stands there,
soaked with rain. Despite the gloomy weather,
she looks dazzling. Knowing her...
choice_data_list:
(She definitely has what it takes to force her
way into everyone's hearts.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We're going to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae originally predicted that I wouldn't run
there, but after all these deviations...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We have no choice. I've gotta show everyone who
the real deal is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we set our sights on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Shakur! Welcome back!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I watched your race live! You were so cool!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You inspired me to work even harder in
preparation for my debut.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I only have so much time, so I need to make every
single one of my races count!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur, is there anything I can do for you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Come watch me run the Arima Kinen in person.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how eager you are to please, I assume
you'll be more than happy to honor my request.
Right, princess?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, of course. But why do you need me
there?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Simple. I need a witness.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're so determined to sacrifice your happiness
to obey your fate... so watch me overthrow mine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...
Just what in the world are you thinking?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: About myself, from start to finish.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But just maybe... once I do this for myself, maybe
I'll finally have the capacity to like you too. Look
forward to it.
